flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Ferris State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.7k → $14.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Ferris State University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.7k → $14.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Ferris State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Ferris State University rose 34% between 2006 and 2009 (14.0% → 18.6%).
